/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_pdcch_processor.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdcch_processor.dir/factories.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdcch_processor.dir/pdcch_encoder_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdcch_processor.dir/pdcch_modulator_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdcch_processor.dir/pdcch_processor_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdcch_processor.dir/pdcch_processor_validator_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_pdcch_processor.a
